summary: Do not ship yet. The literal ID and resource-only canonical are structurally sound, and GitHub confirms 4043080 is ukyi-app/ukyi-homelab-writer, but the authoritative operating contract still prescribes the deleted resolver.
triage: review-gate SKILL.md rules govern: render EVERY finding as a full table row, the human decides each row (accept/reject/defer/question — free text), echo back before applying, max 2 rounds, append decisions.md and COMMIT it with this artifact.

findings.title: Authoritative Seam C still depends on the removed slug resolver
findings.body: The procedure linked from docs/traps-detail.md as the authoritative live verification still requires a token capable of resolving `data.github_app.writer`, overrides the fine-grained token with a broader classic token, and says the ruleset depends on that data source. The active spec likewise freezes the old three-block design. Operators following this contract will unnecessarily use broader credentials, while future increments may reintroduce the exact dependency this seam removes.
findings.recommendation: Update verification.md and spec.md for the literal-ID/resource-only design. Preserve the prior apply results as dated history, then record the supplied fine-grained/classic `No changes` result and current App identity evidence.

next_steps: Synchronize the active spec and Seam C procedure in this branch.
Rerun the 15 canonical gate tests after the documentation update.
